# WPA Leaderboard — IEM Cologne Major 2026

Win Probability Added across **31 maps** / **4204 kills**. Players with ≥30 kills. WPA = sum of the win-probability swing each player's kills produced for their team — impact K/D can't see.

*Generated by `compute_wpa.py`; full table in [wpa_leaderboard.csv](wpa_leaderboard.csv).*
